attempts.strategy: Build the cokernel-transport square as ONE combined cokernel.mapIso with p = (isoRightDerivedObj).symm ₉₉≓ rightDerivedZeroIsoSelf.app
attempts.lean_error: rw/cancel_epi fail on the non-syntactic homology type: the combined square forces rw through the homologyMap origS.g 0 vs (mapHC ⋙ homologyFunctor 0).map ψ defeq
attempts.insight: A single combined cokernel.mapIso forces rw through the homologyMap/homologyFunctor.map defeq on a non-syntactic homology type; rw and cancel_epi both fail there.

attempts.strategy: Split the cokernel transport into TWO cokernel.mapIso steps: coker(homologyMap(Gψ) 0) ≅ coker((R⁰G).map ses.g) ≅ coker(G.map ses.g)
attempts.insight: Step 1 square is exactly isoRightDerivedObj_hom_naturality (lift ses.g to ψ, comm = horseshφ_comm₂₃ in degree 0); step 2 square is literally rightDerivedZeroIsoSelf.hom.naturality ses.g. The defeq is absorbed by feeding nat1.symm through `exact` after Iso.comp_inv_eq + Iso.eq_inv_comp.

attempts.strategy: Discharge the comm hypothesis for the horseshoe square at degree 0
attempts.code_tried: have h0 := congrArg (fun m => HomologicalComplex.Hom.f m 0) (InjectiveResolution.horseshoeφ_comm₂₃ hses I_A I_C); simp only [HomologicalComplex.comp_f, ShortComplex.map_g, CochainComplex.single₀_map_f_zero] at h0; exact h0
attempts.insight: Initial `simpa using h` was too blunt; explicit simp only with the three structure lemmas (comp_f, map_g, single₀_map_f_zero) extracts the degree-0 component cleanly.

attempts.strategy: Close the R⁰G≅G bookkeeping `key` equation via cancel_epi
attempts.code_tried: rw [← cancel_epi (I_J.isoRightDerivedObj G 0).hom, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]; exact (InjectiveResolution.isoRightDerivedObj_hom_naturality ses.g I_J I_C ψ comm G 0).symm
attempts.insight: cancel_epi against isoRightDerivedObj.hom + Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc reduces to the bare naturality lemma; cleaner than the earlier Iso.eq_inv_comp + rw chain.

next_steps: Leaf complete. Feeds the TARGET-3 assembly rightDerivedIsoOfAcyclicResolution.

attempts.strategy: Generalized staircase by induction on m: stairGen : ∀ m s, (R^{m+1}G)(cycles s) ≅ (R¹G)(cycles (s+m)); n=0 and n=m+1 base/step assembled with two eqToIso index bridges
attempts.code_tried: stairGen step: (rightDerivedShiftIsoOfAcyclic G (cosyzygyShortExact K s (hexact s)) m).symm ≓≓ ih (s+1) ... eqToIso (congrArg … (by omega)); n=0: rightDerivedZeroIsoSelf.app A ≓≓ G.mapIso e ≓≓ gHomologyZeroIso G K; n=m+1: (G.rightDerived (m+1)).mapIso e ≓≓ stairGen m 0 ≓≓ eqToIso (0+m=m) ≓≓ rightDerivedOneIsoCokerOfAcyclic (cosyzygyShortExact K m (hexact m)) ≓≓ (cohomologyAppliedResolutionIso G K m).symm
attempts.insight: Acyclicity of the cosyzygy middle term obtained by inferInstanceAs (G.IsRightAcyclic (K.X s)) via defeq (cosyzygyShortComplex K s).X₂ = K.X s. Index arithmetic: s+0/m+0/m+2=(m+1)+1 are defeq (no transport); (s+1)+m vs s+(m+1) and 0+m vs m are NOT defeq, bridged by two eqToIso/omega sites total. Built straight-line off all iter-004..007 + the iter-009 leaf decls.
